creator: madpilot@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

The port installs locale data to ${PREFIX}/lib/locale. In FreeBSD such 
files live in share/locale. I have patched to fix this.

I also finished the optionsng patch to cater for the default DOCS and 
NLS options while there, and added them to the OPTIONS_DEFINE variable, 
to make them also show up in the dialog.

I have trimmed the Makefile header and added full identity for the port 
creator too. Hope there is no problem with this. If you'd rather leave 
just the email there, just tell me.

Can you approve this patch?

Thanks.

-- 
Guido Falsi <madpilot@FreeBSD.org>
